testcase.name: ard_stack_complex_call_error
testcase.failure: Snapshot of code has changed: old[4:7] vs new[4:7] ard_stack(data = mtcars, .by = am, complex_call$ard_summary(variables = "mpg"), ) Condition Error in `ard_stack()`: - ! `cards::ard_stack()` works with simple calls (`?rlang::call_name()`) and `complex_call$ard_summary(variables = "mpg")` is not simple. + ! INTENTIONAL BREAK: Testing gtsummary revdepcheck! New error! * Run `testthat::snapshot_accept("ard_stack", "testthat")` to accept the change. * Run `testthat::snapshot_review("ard_stack", "testthat")` to review the change.

testcase.name: ard_stack_follows_ard_structure

error.message: Error in `ard_stack(data = mtcars, .by = "cyl", ard_summary(variables = "mpg"), ard_tabulate_value(variables = "vs", value = vs ~ 1))`: INTENTIONAL BREAK: Testing gtsummary revdepcheck! New error! ('test-ard_stack.R:256:3')

New error!
